title: Buttery Vinegar Toast
description: A light and chewy Australian dish featuring white wine vinegar on toast, ideal for a quick breakfast or snack that's also paleo-friendly.
instructions: Place the toast slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle each slice with white wine vinegar, ensuring they are evenly coated but not dripping.
Sprinkle melted butter over the toast for added richness and creaminess.
Bake in preheated oven for 2-3 minutes or until the toast is lightly golden and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
